channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 28.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Imagine for a moment what he could do if he were the prime minister, had a legislative majority, and appointed both the Chancellor and the Culture Secretary.
item.description: Imagine for a moment what he could do if he were the prime minister, had a legislative majority, and appointed both the Chancellor and the Culture Secretary.

item.title: The Guardian: Starmer asks TNT Sports to make Champions League final free to view - The Guardian
item.description: Starmer asks TNT Sports to make Champions League final free to view - The Guardian

item.description: Starmer asks TNT Sports to make Champions League final free to view

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer urges TNT to make Champions League final free-to-air
item.description: Starmer urges TNT to make Champions League final free-to-air

item.title: The Telegraph: Starmer takes on TNT Sports over Champions League final paywall - The Telegraph
item.description: Starmer takes on TNT Sports over Champions League final paywall - The Telegraph

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK bets on private investors to fill climate aid gaps after cuts
item.description: UK bets on private investors to fill climate aid gaps after cuts

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Inside the Brexit-voting Labour stronghold that looks set to determine our next prime minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: France bans Israeli minister Itamar Ben-Gvir after 'unspeakable' flotilla detainee taunts
item.description: France bans Israeli minister Itamar Ben-Gvir after 'unspeakable' flotilla detainee taunts

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK needs ‘national consensus’ over rejoining EU, David Miliband says
item.description: UK needs ‘national consensus’ over rejoining EU, David Miliband says
